name: gamejam
description: A beginner-friendly game-jam kit for Codex. Take a game from idea to itch.io by just talking: brainstorm and build a single-file browser game, then ship it — with art, sound, polish, and bug-fixing handled as you build.

interface.shortDescription: Idea to itch.io by just talking — build and ship browser games
interface.longDescription: A beginner-first game-jam kit. You talk, Codex builds: it brainstorms your idea, writes one self-contained index.html you run by double-clicking, and keeps a game brief in AGENTS.md. Art, sound, game-feel polish, and bug-fixing happen as you build — no command needed — and one skill packages the game for an itch.io submission. Codex never opens a browser to test; you play your own build.
defaultPrompt: Help me make a small browser game for a game jam — start by brainstorming the idea with me.
